subcodes.title: Du’a’ li’n-Nuri’l-Abyad
subcodes.first_line: Glorified art Thou, O Lord my God! I beseech Thee by the mightiest of Thy Names, though all Thy Names are mighty in Thy sight and in the Mother Book [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: بسم الله الامنع الاقدس. سبحانک اللهم یا الهی لاسئلنک من اسمائک باعظمها و کل اسمائک عظمیه عندک ثم فی ام الکتاب
subcodes.subjects: @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @prayers (general or uncategorized), @prayer for the Babis; people of the Bayan, @transcendence; unknowability of God, @angels
